name: Go To Hell Must
short_description: Want to decide where mortals go when they die? Welcome to hell! With one click, you can decide whether mortals should go to heaven or stay in hell.
detailed_description:
Game introduction:

As the King of Hell, with a wave of your finger, you can decide where mortals go after death, and you can draw resources from it to govern the entire hell. Deal with your demon girls and your relationship with heaven. You should be careful: every decision will affect the subsequent development, the slightest mistake will fall into the abyss.

Random fate: Random events happen every day that lead to decisions. You need to grasp the balance of all resources in your hands in order to better develop, otherwise this will shake your position.

Demon girls: Demon girls master the portal of various resources, and you need to have a good relationship with them in order to get corresponding help.

Last Supper Time: At the end of each day, you will have dinner with all the demon maidens. You can profit from or befriend them by distributing their food. But be careful, if they have any complaints, they will overthrow you.

Heaven's gaze: Heaven will always watch your strength and will not hesitate to attack if you feel the urge to resist. When you are weak, balance your relationship with heaven. Wait until we have enough resources, then start the counterattack.

Undead King: Don't be afraid of failure, as the king of hell, even if you die, you will be born again, you have countless opportunities, and your enemies only one.

Dating: In your free time, you can date with your favorite demon girls, talk about their favorite topics, and do what you like with them

Marriage: After the relationship with the demon girl has reached a full liking, you can go to the church to make marriage vows and unlock the demon's new drawing

Role Introduction:

Asmodeus，Desire demon，Control the population of hell

Satan，Once the King of hell，Run the economy of hell

Mammon，Your followers，Take charge of religion in the hell

Lucifer，The force of hell，Take charge of the armed forces of Hell

Beelzebub，Gentle intellect，The will of the people governing hell

Beelphegor，Sloth demon，Control the flow rate of stamina

1.1NEW：

Uriel, the monitoring angel, monitoring every move in hell

Israfel, Weeping Angel, Offering New Resources · Star Exchange Store

1.2NEW：

Sariel, fallen angel, the angel who surrenders the fastest in heaven

Azrael, Angel of Death, the most sincere angel
